summary: The diff only shows a metadata update to project_state.json tracking the feature request, but contains no actual implementation. All requirements remain unimplemented.

missing_requirements.reason: No component or template changes were made to add or update the testimonials section heading and subtitle.

missing_requirements.reason: No UI component changes were made to add this indicator element.
